title: Baked Basil Chicken
description: A simple, flavorful dish that combines the richness of baked chicken with the freshness of basil.
instructions: 2. Rinse the chicken breast and pat it dry with paper towels.
3. In a bowl, mix together chopped basil, parmesan cheese, and breadcrumbs.
4. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
5. Dip each chicken breast into the olive oil, then coat in the basil mixture.
6. Place the coated chicken on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
8. Let the chicken rest for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
